title: Vacancy for Category Manager at More Retail Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at More Retail Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at More Retail Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About More Retail Holdings Services:
More Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail Holdings Services!
